problem_solved: Medicaid beneficiaries receive fragmented care that doesn't address social determinants or provide meaningful support
solution_description: Medicaid managed care organization with focus on social determinants and community health workers. Tech-enabled health plan emphasizing SDOH interventions, including housing support, food security, and transportation. Partners with community organizations for wraparound services
notes: New Medicaid-focused health plan with SDOH at core. Very high Varden fit - purpose-built for SDOH in Medicaid. Community health worker model similar to Cityblock. Early stage but strong vision for social care integration
